input.lotDescription: A single-story stucco home near the dry arroyo at the edge of town. The teacher lives here with their spouse and young daughter. The place feels full of life — books, drawings, the smell of dinner cooking — and a steady breeze through open windows.

indoorRooms.spaceDescription: A cozy, sunlit space that serves as the heart of the home. Shelves overflow with books, toys, and half-finished crafts. A ceiling fan hums overhead.

items.itemDescription: Worn but comfortable, draped with a handmade quilt.
Scattered with magazines, colored pencils, and a homework sheet.
Packed with novels, children’s books, and teaching materials.
Keeps the desert heat at bay, occasionally wobbles.
Overflowing with wooden blocks, dolls, and crayons.
Family snapshots on the wall — school events, picnics, holidays.

indoorRooms.spaceDescription: Small but cheerful, painted in pale yellow. It smells like coffee in the morning and roasted vegetables at night. The teacher’s spouse keeps it spotless.

items.itemDescription: Round wooden table with three mismatched chairs.
Magnets hold school notices, drawings, and grocery lists.
Gas burners with a slight tilt to the left, oven used daily.
Stocked with staples — rice, beans, spices, and canned goods.
Always has a mug drying on it.
Small pots of basil, mint, and rosemary on the sill.

indoorRooms.spaceDescription: A converted spare bedroom filled with papers, lesson plans, and stacks of books. The teacher works here late at night grading assignments.

items.itemDescription: Covered in notebooks, red pens, and a half-empty coffee mug.
Old swivel chair with cracked vinyl.
Contains school forms and old student essays.
Stacked with literature, science guides, and binders.
Warm yellow glow that spills over late-night work.
Filled with lesson notes, birthdays, and PTA meetings.

indoorRooms.spaceDescription: Bright and cluttered. The walls are covered in colorful drawings and glow-in-the-dark stars. Stuffed animals crowd the bed.

items.itemDescription: Covered with cartoon-print sheets and a pile of stuffed animals.
Painted blue with stickers of planets and animals.
Filled with bedtime stories and picture books.
Scattered across the small desk near the window.
Depicts the schoolhouse with the family standing in front.

indoorRooms.spaceDescription: Peaceful space with light curtains, a shared dresser, and a quilted bedspread sewn by the teacher’s mother. The window looks out toward the arroyo.

items.itemDescription: Queen-sized bed with hand-sewn quilt.
Holds a book, lamp, and a framed wedding photo.
Top drawer sticks; mirror slightly fogged around the edges.
Shared space for clothes and boxes of family memorabilia.
Soft yellow light, casting warm glow in the evenings.

indoorRooms.spaceDescription: Small, tiled room with a skylight. Smells faintly of soap and desert air. The child’s toothbrush has stickers of stars on the handle.

items.itemDescription: White porcelain, with two mismatched cups beside it.
Old but well-kept.
Tiled, with a curtain patterned with desert wildflowers.
Contains toothpaste, aspirin, and sunscreen.
Three towels in different colors hanging neatly.

outdoorSpaces.spaceDescription: A gravel lot with desert plants, a low wooden fence, and a small covered porch with wind chimes. The daughter’s tricycle is often left near the steps.

items.itemDescription: Swaying gently in the breeze, shaded by the awning.
Made from colored glass pieces that tinkle softly.
Red and shiny, slightly dusty from outdoor play.
Small bed of prickly pear and desert marigold.
Hand-painted with the family’s last name.

outdoorSpaces.spaceDescription: Fenced yard that backs up to the arroyo. The ground is sandy, with a few potted plants and a laundry line stretched between two poles.

items.itemDescription: Held up by two wooden poles, hung with clothes and sheets.
Mixture of succulents and flowers in chipped ceramic pots.
Used for weekend breakfasts and crafts.
Homemade wooden box filled with sand and toy shovels.
Low wooden fence with a gate leading to the arroyo trail.
